sections.title: Fats
sections.narration: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a vegetable, clean nutrient density is the real test.
sections.subtitleText: 0.4g of fat. omega 3 is doing a lot of the work here. for a vegetable, clean nutrient density is the real test.

sections.title: Carbs
sections.narration: 6.6g of carbs. glycemic index, sugar, and fibre are doing most of the work. for vegetables, low downside is useful, but there still needs to be real payoff.
sections.subtitleText: 6.6g of carbs. glycemic index, sugar, and fibre are doing most of the work. for vegetables, low downside is useful, but there still needs to be real payoff.

sections.title: Proteins
sections.narration: 2.8g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is not the main pitch here, but extra support still matters.
sections.subtitleText: 2.8g of protein. bioavailability is one of the best parts of the protein story. protein is not the main pitch here, but extra support still matters.

sections.title: Vitamins
sections.narration: vitamin k at 85% daily value, vitamin c at 99% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is major vitamin support.
sections.subtitleText: vitamin k at 85% daily value, vitamin c at 99% daily value, vitamin a at 12% daily value stand out most. that is major vitamin support.

sections.title: Minerals
sections.narration: minerals are basically not part of the case here.
sections.subtitleText: minerals are basically not part of the case here.

sections.title: Pros
sections.narration: on the plus side: very strong micronutrient payoff because likely to challenge spinach for elite vegetable status. good fibre support because solid maintenance-and-repair fit. strong cruciferous reputation because viewed as a flagship healthy vegetable.

displayItems.title: very strong micronutrient payoff
displayItems.explanation: Likely to challenge spinach for elite vegetable status.

displayItems.title: strong cruciferous reputation
displayItems.explanation: Viewed as a flagship healthy vegetable.

sections.subtitleText: on the plus side: very strong micronutrient payoff because likely to challenge spinach for elite vegetable status. good fibre support because solid maintenance-and-repair fit. strong cruciferous reputation because viewed as a flagship healthy vegetable.

sections.title: Cons
sections.narration: the drawbacks next: taste can be polarising because not universally loved. prep matters a lot because overcooking hurts it badly. can be rough on digestion for some because a practical downside.

displayItems.title: can be rough on digestion for some

sections.subtitleText: the drawbacks next: taste can be polarising because not universally loved. prep matters a lot because overcooking hurts it badly. can be rough on digestion for some because a practical downside.

closing.summary: Broccoli has a genuinely strong overall case. the practical downsides are real, but they do not outweigh the upside. best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want low downside and easy micronutrient support.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
